data.title: Skanska invests SEK 1.3 billion in land in central Stockholm for development.
data.description: In Stockholm on January 16, 2026, Skanska announced the purchase of Tegelbruket 4 from Region Stockholm for approximately SEK 1.3 billion. Situated in the former St. Erik's Eye Hospital area, the property comprises two blocks that will undergo development under Skanska's ownership.

data.title: Binarly discovers firmware bypass chains and 2 Supermicro BMC vulnerabilities, impacting enterprise and AI security.
data.description: A recent announcement made in Santa Monica, California by Binarly revealed the discovery of firmware bypass chains that effectively blind Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) systems. Additionally, two vulnerabilities were identified in Supermicro Baseboard Management Controller (BMC), labelled CVE-2025-12006 and CVE-2025-12007. These developments have significant implications for the security of enterprise and AI systems.

data.title: Affirm's Q2 results for 2026 will be announced on Feb 5, 2026, after market close, through a shareholder letter published on their investor relations website. Conference call/webcast at 2pm PT.
data.description: San Francisco-based Affirm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AFRM) has revealed plans to release its Q2 FY2026 shareholder letter with financial results on its investor relations webpage at https://investors.affirm.com/ after the market closes on Thursday, February 5, 2026. The company will also conduct a conference call and webcast at 2:00pm PT on the same day. Key executives like Max Levchin (Founder and CEO) and Michael Linford (Chief Operating Officer) will be leading the call.

data.title: Expedia Group to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026 via webcast at 1:30 PM PT / 4:30 PM ET. Visit http://ir.expediagroup.com.
data.description: Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE) is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025, covering the period up to December 31, 2025. The details will be shared on Thursday, February 12, 2026, through an official earnings release and webcast. Investors can access these updates through the Investor Relations section of Expedia Group’s corporate website at http://ir.expediagroup.com. The earnings release will be made public after the market closes, and the webcast is scheduled to commence at 1:30 PM Pacific Time / 4:30 PM Eastern Time. Additionally, a call replay option will be provided for those unable to join the initial webcast.

data.title: Graham Holdings Company (NYSE: GHC) sets $1.88 per share dividend, payable on Feb 19, 2026, to record date on Feb 4, 2026.
data.description: A company based in Arlington, Virginia, Graham Holdings Company (NYSE: GHC), has announced a standard quarterly dividend of $1.88 per share. The dividend will be paid on February 19, 2026, to shareholders recorded on February 4, 2026.

data.title: AVAX price aims $15.50-$16.50 by Feb as mixed signals persist. Currently trades at $13.83, with potential 12-19% upside.
data.description: The Avalanche cryptocurrency is currently trading at $13.83, holding a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) alongside analyst price targets ranging between $15.50 and $16.50. Despite a bearish momentum observed in the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD), technical indicators suggest a potential upside of 12-19% in the near future.

data.title: OpenAI and SoftBank jointly invest $1B in SB Energy for 1.2GW Texas data center, part of $5 trillion Stargate AI plan. (Read More)
data.description: OpenAI and SoftBank have jointly invested $500 million each in SB Energy for the development of a new data center in Texas that will have a capacity of 1.2 gigawatts. This strategic move aims to support the $5 trillion Stargate AI infrastructure initiative.

data.title: Polkadot aims for $2.48 resistance by January 2026. Currently trading at $2.13 with RSI at 52.82. Potential rally to $2.75-$3.30 range.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot (DOT) is currently trading at $2.13 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 52.82. Technical analysis suggests a potential target of $2.48 by the end of the month. If momentum continues to build, there is a possibility of a rally leading to a price range between $2.75 and $3.30.

data.title: Hongqi Golden Sunflower Guoya showcased at SailGP Abu Dhabi Grand Final, marks entry into Middle East market.
data.description: On November 30, 2025, during the SailGP Abu Dhabi Grand Final in Dubai, Hongqi Golden Sunflower’s Guoya had its first international appearance as the ceremonial vehicle for the championship trophy. This event also served as the official launch of the brand in the Middle East market, marking a significant move in its global expansion strategy. The Hongqi Golden Sunflower Guoya, renowned for its Eastern aesthetics and superior craftsmanship, received notable recognition during the event.

data.title: MATIC price expected to reach $0.45-$0.52 by Feb 2026, currently trading at $0.38 with potential bounce. 4-6 week target based on technical analysis.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently trading at $0.38, and its neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates potential for an oversold rebound. Technical analysis forecasts price targets of $0.45 to $0.52 within the next 4 to 6 weeks.
